rationale: Educ. Code §43.070 is a reporting requirement for permanent school fund transfers. It contains no funding formula or amount tied to homestead exemption levels, so increasing the exemption does not conflict with this provision.
quote: Not later than November 1 of each even-numbered year, the corporation shall submit to the legislature, comptroller, State Board of Education, and Legislative Budget Board a report that in detail specifically states the date a transfer will be made and the amount the corporation will transfer during the subsequent state fiscal biennium from the permanent school fund to the available school fund under Section 43.066.
_note: No direct conflict. This statute is purely a reporting requirement and does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values.
